case_title: OSCAR ALVARENGA VS. SAVED MUZAFAR SHAH

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,999.00 FILED BY ALVARENGA, OSCAR AS TO DEFENDANT SHAH, SAVED MUZAFAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $100.00 SERVED DEC-03-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SHAH, SAVED MUZAFAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---VANESSA GALO. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2015 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALVARENGA, OSCAR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SHAH, SAVED MUZAFAR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
